description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white and gold color scheme, featuring the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' prominently on the front. The front face displays a large, realistic illustration of a pomegranate, indicating the juice flavor. The top of the carton is angled and fitted with a white plastic screw cap for pouring. One side of the carton contains detailed product information and a nutritional facts panel, while the opposite side displays branding and additional product details. The packaging appears to be made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice cartons, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for casual outdoor consumption.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a pomegranate illustration and a white screw cap, featuring the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' brand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'FARAGELLO' branding vertically and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large pomegranate illustration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with 'FARAGELLO' branding and product details in gold and white.
description_view_3: Back view featuring detailed product information and a visible nutritional information panel.
